title: Compat Structure
description: Adds structures to popular mods. Create, Alex's Caves, Ice and Fire and etc.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/2ztpISf.png) **📖 About** Compat Structure combines 20+ structure addons into one easy-to-use mod. Most structures have their own style, themed loot, hidden treasures, secret rooms, or rare blocks. Instead of installing a bunch of separate structure mods, just drop in Compat Structure — and start exploring! --- **📃 Features** - Mod Style: Structures match the theme of each supported mod. - Hidden Loot: Secret rooms and rare treasures are tucked away. - Mystery Elements: Some builds have hidden goals — solve them for better rewards. --- **📝 Description** How it works: You install Compat Structure — and let the world handle the rest. If a supported mod is detected, related structures, dungeons, and features are added into your world. If not — your world stays clean. **📋 List of Supported Mods**
Spoiler Compat Structure adds structures for the following mods *(only if installed)*: **Ad Astra** Adds 5 structures, with hidden loot. Structures will be spawned on Mars, the Moon, Overworld. Adds puzzle structures: Moon Station --- **Applied Energistics 2** Adds a few structures, with rare blocks. Structures will be spawned on Overworld. --- **Aether** Adds 15 structures, with themed loot. Structures will be spawned on Aether, Overworld. Adds puzzle structures: Aether Gate Structure Redesign: --- **Alex’s Caves** Adds 5 structures, with hidden loot and mystery elements. Structures will be spawned Alex's Caves. Adds puzzle structures: Uranium Mine --- **Alex’s Mobs** Adds 5 structures, with themed loot. Structures will be spawned on Overworld. Adds puzzle structures: Large Zoo Structure Redesign: --- **Ars Nouveau** Adds 12 structures, with hidden loot and themed loot. Structures will be spawned on Overworld. Adds puzzle structures: Free Mutant Tree Structure Redesign: --- **Artifacts** Adds 5 structures, with hidden loot. Structures will be spawned on Nether, The End, Overworld. Adds puzzle structures: Catacombs Structure Redesign: --- **Biomes O’ Plenty** Adds 5 structures, with mystery elements. Structures will be spawned on Nether and Overworld. Adds puzzle structures: Museum Structure Redesign: --- **Oh The Biomes We’ve Gone** Adds 3 structures, with mystery elements. Structures will be spawned on Overworld. --- **Botania** Adds 5 structures, with hidden loot. Structures will be spawned on Overworld. --- **Create** Adds 40+ structures, with hidden loot, rare blocks and mystery elements. Structures will be spawned on Overworld. --- **Epic Fight** Adds structure, with mystery elements. Structures will be spawned Overworld. --- **Ice and Fire** Adds 30+ structures, with hidden loot, themed loot and mystery elements. Structures will be spawned on Overworld. Adds puzzle structures: Volcano Structure Redesign: --- **Immersive Engineering** Adds a few structures, with themed loot. Structures will be spawned Overworld. --- **Iron’s Spells & Spellbooks** Adds 5 structures, with hidden loot and mystery elements. Structures will be spawned Overworld. Adds puzzle structures: Magic Swamp Village Structure Redesign: --- **Mowzie’s Mobs** Adds 3 structures, with hidden loot. Structures will be spawned on Overworld. Structure Redesign: --- **Naturalist** Adds 5 structures, with themed loot. Structures will be spawned on Overworld. --- **Quark** Adds 5 structures, with hidden loot and mystery elements. Structures will be spawned on Overworld. Adds puzzle structures: Market Structure Redesign: --- **Tinkers’ Construct** Adds 5 structures, with hidden loot and themed loot. Structures will be spawned on Overworld. --- **Twilight Forest** Adds 5 structures, with hidden loot and mystery elements. Structures will be spawned on Twilight Forest.
--- **🎁 Bonus Info** If you install all supported mods, you’ll unlock ~150 structures. --- **🧾 Credits** Some of the original addons were distributed under the **MIT License**, which allows their content to be legally used in this mod. In addition, all necessary permissions from the original creators have been obtained. The current version is released under the **MIT License**, even though many changes were made to the data files and code. --- _**Drop your feedback, thx!**_
